title: Method: pane.resize
text:
Method name: `pane.resize`

Parameters (REQUIRED):

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `selector` | string | REQUIRED | A pane selector string per [[RFC-0001:C-SELECTORS]]. |
| `resize_type` | string | REQUIRED | Either `"increase"` or `"decrease"`. |
| `direction` | string or null | OPTIONAL | One of `"left"`, `"right"`, `"up"`, `"down"`, or `null` for undirected resize. |
| `step` | integer | OPTIONAL | Number of resize steps to apply. Defaults to `1`. MUST be >= 1. |

The plugin MUST resolve the selector to exactly one pane. If zero panes match, the plugin MUST return `no_match`. If multiple panes match, the plugin MUST return `ambiguous_match`.

The plugin MUST construct a `ResizeStrategy` with `invert_on_boundaries` set to `true` and call `resize_pane_with_id` once per step.

If `resize_type` is not `"increase"` or `"decrease"`, the plugin MUST return `invalid_params`. If `direction` is provided and is not one of the four valid values, the plugin MUST return `invalid_params`.

On success, the response MUST contain `{"resized": "<pane_id>"}`.
